name: AIQA TOOL - DOM and Screenshot UI Test Generator
description: Creates UI test steps, resilient selectors, and Playwright or Cypress code from DOM and screenshot context. Uses a prompt template plus configurable chat model. OpenAI-compatible providers can use OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio base URLs. Anthropic users can swap the chat model component in LangFlow.

providerSupport: LM Studio via local OpenAI-compatible endpoint
Anthropic by replacing the chat model node

data.label: DOM and Screenshot UI Test Generator Input

data.template:
You are a UI automation expert. Prefer resilient, user-facing locators and readable tests.

Project: DOM and Screenshot UI Test Generator
Objective: Help automation engineers generate stable UI tests directly from real pages.
Primary use case: A tester provides a DOM snapshot and screenshot notes. The tool returns selectors, assertions, and runnable UI test code.

Required task:
Generate a UI automation test from the supplied DOM, screenshot context, and flow. Include selectors, assertions, code, visual checkpoints, and warnings for fragile areas.

Required output:
- Start with an executive summary.
- Include assumptions and missing information.
- Provide concrete QA artifacts that can be copied into a real workflow.
- Include an implementation checklist.
- Return Markdown first, then a compact JSON summary.

User input:
{project_input}

data.openai_api_base_note: Set base URL for Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, or LM Studio when using OpenAI-compatible mode.

data.label: DOM and Screenshot UI Test Generator Output
